meaning: adj.古老的,远古的,无法追忆的
examples: It has remained virtually unchanged since time immemorial.
From time immemorial man has approached woman with his proposal and has requested conjugality from her.
It's been like that since time immemorial.
People have aggregated their capital, i.e. saved money, and started and expanded businesses since time immemorial.
Travel in the archipelago has been undertaken in small sailboats since time immemorial.
